message:
feat: auto-discover new tmux sessions and attach as tabs (#82)

Server polls every 3s for new non-cr-* tmux sessions and broadcasts
discoveries to terminal WebSocket clients.

Client polls /api/tmux-sessions every 3s. When a new user-created
tmux session appears, it auto-attaches as a new tab. Sessions that
disappear are cleaned from the known set.

To test: run 'tmux new-session -d -s my-work' and watch it appear
as a new tab in the web UI within seconds.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
